description_long: This object is a wooden filing cabinet with a simple, boxy design and a dark brown finish. The surface features visible wood grain patterns and knots, giving it a rustic and natural appearance. The cabinet lacks any visible handles, drawers, or label holders, presenting a seamless exterior on all sides. The top is flat and bordered by a slightly raised edge, which could help prevent items from sliding off. The construction appears sturdy, with thick panels and reinforced corners. There are no visible locks or mechanisms, suggesting a minimalist and utilitarian style.
description: A dark brown, wooden filing cabinet with a seamless, boxy design and visible wood grain. It has a flat top with a raised edge and no visible handles or drawers.
description_view_0: The front view shows a flat wooden panel with prominent wood grain and a slightly raised border around the top.
description_view_1: This side view is nearly identical to the front, with similar wood grain patterns and no visible features or openings.
description_view_2: The rear view mirrors the front, with a flat wooden surface and natural wood markings.
description_view_3: This side view is also similar to the others, showing a plain wooden panel with subtle grain and no distinguishing features.
